commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=79db43039b32e1ded578a383cfae3fe7113d442f)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds provider-qualified context-window cache lookup behavior, starts context discovery from the shared resolver, changes status slash-model lookup, and delegates CLI status context resolution to the shared resolver.

PR surface: Source -37. Total -37 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current CLI status can fall back to `DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS`, and PR regressions are source-reproducible through existing read-only lookup tests and status slash-model invariants.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch needs contributor or maintainer revision plus external real behavior proof; automation should not substitute for the missing proof gate on this external PR.

target.title: fix(status): delegate CLI status context resolution and fix slash-model 200K bug (closes #92760)
target.body:
## Description

Fix for \/status\ and CLI \openclaw status\ showing \200K\ (DEFAULT_CONTEXT_TOKENS) for models with slash-containing IDs (e.g. \opencode-go/deepseek-v4-flash\, \openrouter/anthropic/claude-sonnet-4\).

## Root Cause

Three layers blocked correct context window resolution for slash-model IDs:

1. **\!ref.model.includes("/")\ guard** (\context.ts\) �X blocked qualified cache-key lookup for models whose name contains a slash
2. **No async discovery kickoff** �X \ensureContextWindowCacheLoaded()\ never ran during normal gateway operation because all callers set \skipRuntimeConfigLoad = true\
3. **CLI standalone copy** �X \status.summary.runtime.ts\ had its own local copy of \esolveContextTokensForModel\ instead of delegating to the implementation in \context.ts\

## Changes

| Commit | Fix | File |
|--------|-----|------|
| 9334dd4 | Remove \!ref.model.includes("/")\ guard | \src/agents/context.ts\ |
| 545e5e3 | Store provider-qualified keys (\provider/model\) in discovery cache | \src/agents/context.ts\ |
| f713b90 | Kick off async model discovery on first ref resolution | \src/agents/context.ts\ |
| dc93b5c | Move discovery kickoff inside \if(ref)\ guard per review | \src/agents/context.ts\ |
| 38c0a1d | Extract embedded provider from slash-model ID in status | \src/status/status-message.ts\ |
| fff66f1 | Move kickoff to \TOP\ of \if(ref)\ �X covers all resolver paths | \src/agents/context.ts\ |
| 79db430 | Delegate CLI status context resolution to real function | \src/commands/status.summary.runtime.ts\ |

## Verification Evidence

**User manual test** (on gateway with build \(58270ec)\, 2026-06-14 02:35):

\\\
# opencode-go/deepseek-v4-flash �X WAS 200K, NOW 1.0M ?
?? Context: 0/1.0m (0%)

# opencode/nemotron-3-ultra-free �X correctly 1.0M ?
?? Context: 401/1.0m (0%)

# opencode/deepseek-v4-flash-free �X correctly 200K ?
?? Context: 611/200k (0%)
\\\

**Dist audit** �X Confirmed: all 7 patches present in both source \src/\ and installed dist \context-ClaruzGd.js:227\. \status.summary.runtime.js\ correctly imports from \context-ClaruzGd.js\.

**TUI verification** �X TUI correctly shows live context tracking and correct window for each model.

## Related

- Closes #92760 �X CLI \openclaw status\ standalone copy
- Related #39857 �X Original 200K context window report
